parameters.jsCode:
// LinkedIn scraping simulation
// In production: use Phantombuster, Apify, or LinkedIn API
const category = $input.first().json.category;
const country = $input.first().json.country;

const linkedinLeads = [
  {
    name: 'John Smith',
    title: 'CEO',
    company: 'Sample Corp',
    industry: category,
    location: country,
    website: 'https://samplecorp.com',
    companySize: '50-200',
    email: '',
    phone: '',
    source: 'linkedin',
    category: category,
    country: country,
    isDecisionMaker: true
  },
  {
    name: 'Sarah Johnson',
    title: 'Marketing Director',
    company: 'Growth Agency',
    industry: category,
    location: country,
    website: 'https://growthagency.com',
    companySize: '10-50',
    email: 'sarah@growthagency.com',
    phone: '',
    source: 'linkedin',
    category: category,
    country: country,
    isDecisionMaker: true
  }
];

return linkedinLeads.map(lead => ({ json: lead }));
